001package net.okocraft.box.api.model.data;
002
003import com.github.siroshun09.configapi.api.Configuration;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005
006import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
007
008/**
009 * An interface of container that holds custom data.
010 */
011public interface CustomDataContainer {
012
013    /**
014     * Gets data from the container.
015     *
016     * @param namespace the namespace
017     * @param key       the data key
018     * @return the {@link CompletableFuture} to get {@link Configuration}
019     */
020    @NotNull CompletableFuture<@NotNull Configuration> get(@NotNull String namespace, @NotNull String key);
021
022    /**
023     * Sets data to the container.
024     *
025     * @param namespace     the namespace
026     * @param key           the data key
027     * @param configuration the data
028     * @return  the {@link CompletableFuture} to set {@link Configuration}
029     */
030    @NotNull CompletableFuture<Void> set(@NotNull String namespace, @NotNull String key,
031                                         @NotNull Configuration configuration);
032
033}
